title: Fluffy Lazy Ukrainian Green Red Lentils Pilaf
description: A hearty and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring green and red lentils, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This pillowy pilaf is infused with umami flavor and is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated carrot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the sliced mushroom and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the rinsed green and red lentils, vegetable broth, and salt to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Deglaze the saucepan with a little water to remove any browned bits and serve the pilaf with the deglazed sauce.
